Video.summary: Drew Carey talks about cold weather and global warming. Fellow guests are David Steinberg and Regis Philbin.
Video.title: Comic Legends Of The '90s - Drew Carey (1/10/92)

Image.alt: Comic Legends Of The '90s - Drew Carey (1/10/92)
Comic Legends Of The '90s - Drew Carey (1/10/92)

Video.summary: Father and daughter night! Comedian Richard Pryor accompanies his daughter, actress Rain Pryor.
Video.title: The Best Of Richard Pryor (5/11/89)

The Best Of Richard Pryor (5/11/89)

Video.summary: Burt Reynolds fesses up to coveting an Oscar. Plus Jimmy Carter’s mom, Miss Lillian, appears.

Video.summary: The inimitable Bob Hope offers his 2 cents on the Reagan – Carter debate andsleeping in the Lincoln bedroom.

Video.summary: Johnny re-enacts the Hamilton and Burr duel. Joan Rivers admits to screaming during childbirth.
